questions.text: The marketing director decided to _______ the launch of the new product until the software bugs were fixed.
Mr. Henderson is _______ for overseeing the merger between the two telecommunications giants.

The CEO's speech was so _______ that several investors decided to increase their funding immediately.

The technician _______ the server yesterday, so the network should be much faster now.

_______ the bad weather, the outdoor corporate retreat was a huge success.
